title: (2 Pack) Kids Indoor Golf Club Toddler Activity Pretend Play Set, Ages 3-8
description:
Learn to play golf just like Dad with the Kidplay Products Kids 2pk Golf Caddy Set! These children's golf sets are a great way to get your child outside for some fun playtime. With the golf clubs and putting cups, your children will learn fine motor skills and hand eye coordination. Watch as they develop new skills while having fun with these golf-themed pretend play sets! Each set comes with 2 practice golf holes, 3 golf balls and 3 different types of clubs.
